title: Approve Employee Record (Employee Management)
acceptanceCriteria: Manager / Supervisor can perform "Approve Employee Record" only when business rules and validations for Employee are satisfied; result is reflected in status and audit trail.
businessRules: email must be valid and unique
joiningDate must not be in the future
managerId must reference an active Employee record
required fields (name, department, email) must be present before activation

workflow.name: Entity-Record Management
workflow.stateTransition: Entity-Record Management -> Employee Management -> Approve Employee Record

business.reason: Supports the Entity-Record Management business pattern for "Employee Management": Approve Employee Record is a mandatory lifecycle step - without it the module cannot transition to the next state.
businessRules: email must be valid and unique
joiningDate must not be in the future
managerId must reference an active Employee record
required fields (name, department, email) must be present before activation
validations: email must be valid and unique
joiningDate must not be in the future
managerId must reference an active Employee record
required fields (name, department, email) must be present before activation
business.stateTransition: Entity-Record Management -> Employee Management -> Approve Employee Record
business.acceptanceCriteria: Manager / Supervisor can perform "Approve Employee Record" only when business rules and validations for Employee are satisfied; result is reflected in status and audit trail.
edgeCases: Approve Employee Record attempted with missing/invalid required fields
Approve Employee Record attempted by a role without permission
Approve Employee Record attempted on a record in an incompatible status

navigation: Detail drawer opens from list row click
Back to list from detail view

positiveTests: Approve Employee Record succeeds end-to-end with valid data and an authorized role; status/audit trail updates correctly.
negativeTests: Approve Employee Record is rejected when required fields are missing or invalid, with a clear error message.
validationTests: Each business validation listed for Employee Management is independently exercised against Approve Employee Record.
permissionTests: Approve Employee Record is rejected for any role not listed in this step's authorized roles.
workflowTests: Full lifecycle test: create -> Approve Employee Record -> downstream state is consistent with the Entity-Record Management pattern.
regressionTests: Medium - secondary step, breaking this degrades but does not block the module
securityTests: Verify role-based access for Manager / Supervisor.
coverageRules: REQ-EMPLOYEE-05 must map to at least one test and one implementation file.

release.rollbackStrategy: Disable or roll back Employee Management Approve Employee Record changes while preserving audit data.

automationTests: Positive: Approve Employee Record succeeds with valid data and authorized role
Negative: Approve Employee Record rejected with invalid data
Access: Approve Employee Record rejected for unauthorized role

evidence.status: Pending until coding agent writes evidence.
